hold_reason: Public Alpha repository publication and Japanese short external announcement have been intentionally unlocked by the maintainer. Commercial landing page, public release blog, and production release claims remain blocked.
minimum_public_exit_criteria: Bridge UI reflects connected/offline state clearly enough for alpha users
UI can display device and simulated workflow results
At least one real microphone alpha path is validated on macOS
Public README has limitations and no production overclaims
Private core boundary and leakage scans pass
Maintainer explicitly flips public_oss_announcement_allowed to true
Repository visibility is intentionally changed by the maintainer
